fields.title: Fix exa split-brain: remove unused ExaService tag, use Effect-native decoding
fields.description: exa/index.ts defines ExaService as ServiceMap.Service but never provides it through Layer - it is consumed as a plain object. The ExaService tag is dead code. Also, exaPost uses try { Schema.decodeUnknownSync } catch inside an Effect.gen which should use Schema.decodeUnknown. And services/exa.ts is a pointless wrapper.
fields.close_reason: Removed unused ExaService ServiceMap.Service tag. Replaced try { Schema.decodeUnknownSync } catch with Schema.decodeUnknownEffect + mapError in exaPost, staying inside the Effect pipeline.
